rule: Every concurrent agent lane works in its OWN git worktree on its OWN branch. Never commit lane work to the shared main checkout (sina-governance-SSOT). See docs/AGENT_WORKTREE_ISOLATION_v1.md.

main_checkout.role: SHARED — do not do lane work here; reserve for integration/review only
main_checkout.note: Historically collided: L0 + product-lock + sandbox agents all committed onto cursor/language-layer-v1 here. Drain to per-lane worktrees.

lanes.owns: commercial product category map + lock receipts
